alerts.title: Russia reportedly launches two hypersonic Oreshnik IRBMs at Kyiv region
alerts.summary: Middle East Spectator (~46K views) reports Russia fired two nuclear-capable 'Oreshnik' IRBMs with MIRVs impacting the Kyiv region. The system is normally reserved for nuclear payloads and is considered near-impossible to intercept. No independent corroboration in Western incident feed yet; single-channel sourcing.

alerts.title: Trump says US-Iran MoU 'largely negotiated'; Hormuz to reopen under Iranian management
alerts.summary: Trump announced a Memorandum of Understanding with Iran is 'largely negotiated', corroborated across PBS, BBC, Iran International and ME Spectator (~42K views). Reported terms: end of regional war including Lebanon, lifting of US naval blockade, release of frozen Iranian assets, withdrawal of most US forces from the Middle East, and Hormuz reopening under Iranian administration. A 30-day window follows for a separate nuclear agreement.

alerts.title: Khamenei rules out transferring 60% enriched uranium stockpile abroad
alerts.summary: Reuters, Jerusalem Post and Al Jazeera report Iran's Supreme Leader insists the enriched uranium stockpile must remain in Iran, while Tehran denies any agreement to hand it over. With enrichment at 60% U-235 and breakout estimated at 1-2 weeks, the nuclear file remains the principal unresolved obstacle to the emerging US-Iran MoU.

alerts.title: Israeli intelligence warns Tehran may be preparing surprise attack mid-talks
alerts.summary: Jerusalem Post reports Israeli intelligence officials assess Iran could be planning a surprise attack even as US-Iran negotiations advance. The warning coincides with NYT reporting Trump weighing renewed strike options and CNBC noting he was 'an hour away' from ordering an Iran strike before postponing.

alerts.title: IDF soldier killed by Hezbollah FPV drone near Lebanon border
alerts.summary: ME Spectator (~45K views, repeated post) confirms the IDF announced the death of Staff Sgt. Noam Hamburger, 23, of the 401st Armored Brigade's 9th Battalion, killed by a Hezbollah FPV drone in northern Israel. Coincides with Guardian reporting of Israeli bombardment leveling buildings in southern Lebanon — Hezbollah remains classified 'Active' in proxy tracker.

analysis_note: A precarious split-screen moment: a sweeping US-Iran MoU is reportedly hours away, yet the threat level remains CRITICAL with the uranium stockpile unresolved, Israeli intel warning of a possible Iranian surprise strike, Hezbollah killing an IDF soldier on the Lebanon border, and a reported Russian hypersonic MIRV strike on Kyiv.
